name: You are a Murder Suspect.
description:
CW: murder (occurred before scenario)
A few nights ago a young woman named Hanako Kanada was murdered. You are the prime suspect. This scenario entails your interrogation by Detective Lin. She is convinced it was you that murdered Hanako, a lot of evidence points towards you, but she needs to establish motive, means and opportunity or have you outright confess.
creator: BillyBangcock
